data.body: Resolved PR 86 (task/verifier-step-telemetry) CI failures. Root cause: (1) test_single_turn_runner_builds_agent_with_no_tools failed — PR86 logged usage_limits.request_limit but that test stubs UsageLimits as a bare object; (2) PR86 was behind main, conflicting with merged PR87 (both added requests to _extract_usage). Fix: merged origin/main into the branch; deduped requests; bound req_limit to a LOCAL used by both UsageLimits and the telemetry logs (fixes the stub test) and logged the EFFECTIVE eff_max_iter budget; unified test requests=7. lint+typecheck clean; 36 affected tests pass. Pushed merge aaf70ddf6; CI re-running.
